description_long: This awning features a pitched, gabled roof constructed from what appears to be corrugated wooden or composite panels, supported by a simple frame of four slender metal posts. The canopy is rectangular in shape, with the roof sloping down from a central ridge, providing effective shelter from sun and rain. The wood or composite panels are arranged in a linear pattern, giving the surface a textured, rustic appearance. The support structure is minimalistic, with exposed metal posts at each corner, likely made of steel or aluminum for durability. The edges of the canopy are straight and unadorned, emphasizing a utilitarian design. There is no visible branding, signage, or decorative trim, making this awning suitable for a variety of urban environments such as parks, bus stops, or outdoor seating areas.
description: A rectangular, pitched-roof awning with corrugated wooden panels and four metal support posts, featuring a simple, utilitarian design with straight edges and no visible signage.
description_view_0: The gabled end of the awning is visible, showing the pitched roof and two supporting metal posts.
description_view_1: The full length of the rectangular canopy is seen from the side, with all four metal posts visible and the corrugated panel pattern prominent.
description_view_2: The opposite gabled end is shown, mirroring view 0 with the pitched roof and two posts.
description_view_3: The other long side of the awning is visible, similar to view 1, displaying the straight edge and support posts.
attribute_mounting_location: freestanding on flat ground or pavement
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with four vertical metal posts
